lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Your Legendary exploits are travelling the whole jungle.

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Gujuo has been to see me. He told me that you have been given a sacred totem pole. It was constructed by one of my ancestors many moons ago. It is a noble prize Bwana, you have earned it. Look after it well.

sections.title: If the player attempts to attack Ungadulu while inside the ring

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: I hope that teaches you to respect your elders!

sections.title: If the player attempts to attack Ungadulu with curse spells while outside the ring
If the player attempts to attack Ungadulu with melee while outside the ring
If attacking Ungadulu with holy water

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Vile serpent, thou wilt pay for that!

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: ...What, what happened? Why am I all wet?

sections.title: If the player casts the curse spell on Ungadulu before talking to him

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Ha ha ha ha! Die, Vacu!

sections.title: If the player talks to Ungadulu and then casts curse on him

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Foolish Vacu... now thou shalt be my pawn...

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Iles Resti Yam Darkus Spiritus Possesi Yanai...

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Run, Bwana! Stay away from here!

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Thank you, Bwana! You have released me from the demon's grasp, but only for a short while! You must seek out the Book of Binding - it's hidden in these caves somewhere!.

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: There are many trials you must pass... but please, you're my only hope of escape!

sections.title: If the player uses the Book of Binding on Ungadulu

lines.speaker: Ungadulu
lines.text: Curse you... foul intruder... wretched Vacu! Thy meddling ways hath brought thee to thy doom!
